THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IMBELLONI CONSTRUCTION, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JARON, PATRICIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 700 STEINER STREET, NO. 704, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94117 $3,463.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,463.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION RE: DAILY RENTAL $37.93 FILED BY PLAINTIFF IMBELLONI CONSTRUCTION, INC.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JARON, PATRICIA

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT PATRICIA JARON'S EX PARTE REQUEST FOR RELIEF FROM FORFEITURE (PURSUANT TO CCP 1179). MS. JARON WAS SWORN AND GAVE TESTIMONY, AND WAS THEN EXAMINED BY MR. WILEY. AFTER HEARING ARGUMENT FROM THE PARTIES, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED ON THE CONDITIONS THAT PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY FEES OF $2000.00 AND COSTS OF $325.00 ARE PAID BY JULY 15, 2009, AND IF JULY RENT PAYMENT IS MADE BY JULY 6, 2009 BY CASH, CASHIER'S CHECK OR MONEY ORDER. PLAINTIFF MAY SEEK POSSESSION BY EX PARTE APPLICATION SHOULD DEFENDANT FAIL TO COMPLY WITH THESE CONDITIONS. MAY AND JUNE RENT PAYMENTS TOTALLING $2276.00 WERE MADE IN COURT TO MR. WILEY, AND A RECEIPT PROVIDED TO DEFENDANT. MR. WILEY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
Defendant Patricia Jaron'S Ex Parte Request For Relief From Forfeiture (Ccp 1179)
Off Calendar Jun-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PATRICIA JARON'S EX PARTE REQUEST FOR RELIEF FROM FORFEITURE (PURSUANT TO CCP 1179)

Appearances:
John Wiley, 863-0500, appearing for plaintiff and responding party
Patricia Jaron, 465-0580, defendant and moving party appearing in propria persona, with friend Robert Ward

Ms. Jaron was sworn and gave testimony, and was then examined by Mr. Wiley. After hearing argument from the parties, the Court ruled as follows: granted on the conditions that plaintiff's attorney fees of $2000.00 and costs of $325.00 are paid by July 15, 2009, and if July rent payment is made by July 6, 2009 by cash, cashier's check or money order. Plaintiff may seek possession by ex parte application should defendant fail to comply with these conditions. May and June rent payments totalling $2276.00 were made in Court to Mr. Wiley, and a receipt provided to defendant. Mr. Wiley to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-10-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John R. Wiley, Esq., appeared for plaintiff Imbelloni Construction, Inc. with manager Nora Carrasco.
Defendant Patricia Jaron appeared with limited scope attorney Anthony Capozolla, Esq.

Settlement Conference held. Parties entered into Stipulation for Entry of Unlawful Detainer Judgment as to the premises at 700 Steiner Street, #704, San Francisco, CA which was not filed. Trial date vacated.

Hon William R. Gargano/Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest, Clerk Garth Sayers, Not reported. (218)
